howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to create a personalized memory book
howStep1Desc: Drag and drop your favorite moments — selfies, trips, celebrations, everyday magic.
howStep2Desc: Pick from Romantic, Funny, Elegant, or Vintage — each with unique colors, fonts, and mood.
howStep3Desc: AI writes warm narratives, designs pages, and generates a downloadable PDF memory book.
featuresSubtitle: Every feature designed to make your memories shine
featureNarrativesDesc: Warm, heartfelt stories crafted by AI that capture the emotion in your photos.
featureTemplatesDesc: Romantic, Funny, Elegant, or Vintage — each with distinct colors, fonts, and personality.
featureAnalysisDesc: AI understands scenes, emotions, and people to create the perfect page layout.
featurePdfDesc: Get a beautifully designed, print-ready PDF memory book in minutes.
featureVoiceDesc: Tell your story by voice — our speech-to-text captures every word.
featurePersonalizedDesc: Add names, occasions, and vibe preferences for a truly custom experience.
